name: send_email_template
description: Send an email using a pre-defined Postmark template. Templates allow you to define the email layout, subject, and body in the Postmark dashboard, then fill in dynamic values at send time using a template model. This keeps email content out of your code and makes it easy for non-developers to edit emails.

parameters.name: TemplateId
parameters.description: The numeric ID of the template to use. Either TemplateId or TemplateAlias is required.

parameters.name: TemplateAlias
parameters.description: The string alias of the template to use. Either TemplateId or TemplateAlias is required.

parameters.name: TemplateModel
parameters.description: Key-value pairs of template variables to substitute into the template. The keys must match the variable names defined in your template.

parameters.name: From
parameters.description: Sender email address. Must be a confirmed Sender Signature.

parameters.name: To
parameters.description: Recipient email address(es). Comma-separated for multiple.

parameters.name: Tag
parameters.description: Tag for categorizing this email in stats.

parameters.name: Metadata
parameters.description: Custom key-value metadata to attach to the message.
